mission: I'm building broad, deep competence across math, science, technology, philosophy, history, and the arts — one deliberate topic at a time.
motto: Nulla dies sine linea — no day without a line drawn.
quotes: The person who says it cannot be done should not interrupt the person doing it. — Confucius
I am not a genius, I am just curious. I ask many questions, and when the answer is simple, then I know it is right. — Buckminster Fuller
An expert is a person who has made all the mistakes that can be made in a very narrow field. — Niels Bohr
The more I read, the more I acquire, the more certain I am that I know nothing. — Voltaire
Learning never exhausts the mind. — Leonardo da Vinci
It is not that I'm so smart. But I stay with the questions much longer. — Albert Einstein
The whole of science is nothing more than a refinement of everyday thinking. — Albert Einstein
Study without desire spoils the memory, and it retains nothing that it takes in. — Leonardo da Vinci
What we know is a drop, what we don't know is an ocean. — Isaac Newton
Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known. — Carl Sagan
